evals.prompt: pretend you're a new member on a brand new computer. walk through the install instructions in README.md step by step and see where you run into hiccups
evals.expected_output: Spawns a fresh zero-context agent with the non-technical persona brief (does NOT walk it itself), walker executes real commands, returns a hiccup ledger in journey order with severities, orchestrator fixes blockers/friction at root cause, respawns a NEW walker, loops until clean or 5 rounds.

evals.prompt: we just rewrote the quick start guide. does it actually work for someone who's never seen this project?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the fresh-eyes pattern without the word 'walkthrough'. Confirms persona/entry point/done state, then runs the spawn-walk-fix-respawn loop. Never reuses a walker across rounds.

evals.prompt: take me through a test run of the app the way a real user would use it
evals.expected_output: Defines the done state, spawns a persona walker that drives the actual app (not the test suite), reports the journey in order encountered with a felt-experience paragraph.
